mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VX_CustomerBaseDetails (chatId, name, owner, createTime, member_list, createTime2) VALUES (#{chatId}, #{name}, #{owner}, #{createTime}, #{memberList}, GETDATE())

INSERT INTO VX_CustomerBaseDetails_GroupMembers (chatId, userid, type, join_time, join_scene, invitor, name, unionId, createTime) VALUES
(#{item.chatId}, #{item.userid}, #{item.type}, #{item.joinTime}, #{item.joinScene}, #{item.invitor}, #{item.name}, #{item.unionId}, GETDATE())
mapper.select:
SELECT g.chatId, g.name, g.owner, d.name AS ownerName, g.member_list AS memberList, g.createTime FROM VX_CustomerBaseDetails g LEFT JOIN VX_DepartmentMembersList d ON g.owner = d.userid
AND g.name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%'
AND d.name LIKE '%' + #{ownerName} + '%'
ORDER BY g.createTime DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM VX_CustomerBaseDetails g LEFT JOIN VX_DepartmentMembersList d ON g.owner = d.userid
AND g.name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%'
AND d.name LIKE '%' + #{ownerName} + '%'
